3106080.name: Transit World
3106080.description:
Welcome to Transit World – your world of transport, management, and decisions.
Build your own company, plan routes and contracts, expand your fleet, and watch your ideas grow into a functioning transport network.

In Transit World, you start small – with limited vehicles, little capital, and big ambitions.
Decide how your company evolves: take on delivery jobs between cities, operate passenger lines, or experience life behind the wheel yourself.
Everything is connected – finances, staff, contracts, and the constantly changing environment around you.

The World

The world of Transit World is fictional, but inspired by Central Europe. It is varied and exciting, so your journeys will never be boring.

The weather, the time of day and economic changes all affect your business. You decide how to respond to new situations – strategically, efficiently or simply with a good gut feeling.

Vehicles

Drive or manage a growing fleet of modern transport vehicles – from city buses to long-distance lorries. All models are faithfully reproduced and some are licensed.

Buses, vans, lorries and trailers await you – perfectly tailored to your assignments and business strategy.

Partners & Technology

Transit World is developed in collaboration with leading Swiss transport partners, including PostAuto, Autobus AG, Engadin Bus, ATRON, FELA, and ZELISKO.
Their real-world systems and branding bring authenticity to your experience and make your company feel like part of a living, modern transport world.

Gameplay & Features

  • Build your own transport company – from your first drive to a large, connected network

  • Plan, organize, and manage finances, employees, and vehicles

  • Take on contracts for deliveries, passenger lines, and logistics jobs

  • Drive vehicles yourself or let your team handle the work

  • Experience economic changes, staff management, and real-world driver shortages

  • Unlock new regions, vehicles, and opportunities

  • Play in Career Mode with story-driven company management
    or in Sandbox Mode, where you can freely start missions and contracts at your own pace

A Game with Heart

Transit World is more than driving and management – it’s about building something that works.
A passion project made with love for vehicles, strategy, and the people who keep our world moving.

Start your engine, take charge – and make the roads your world.
